---
title: "Rāg Iman"
subtitle: "*Sapta sura tina*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Guṇasen &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Cautāl (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> sapta sura tina grāma ekiśa mūrachana  
> bāiśa śurati me unañcāśa koṭa tāna sādha nāda

**Antarā**

> ārohī abarohī āsthāyī sañcāri dhūraṇa mūraṇa  
> ughaṭa pragaṭa tivara bā nikhāda

**Sanchārī**

> kaṇṭhā bharaṇa banāve sāco paṭarī  
> paṭhāve sura samvāda

**Ābhog**

> sāre sāre gāgā regā gāresā pāmā gāgā regā gāre  
> sāregāmā pādhā nidhāpā nidhāpā nini dhādhā pāpā  
> gāgāresā saregāmā pādhā purta surata miṭata vāda

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Cautāl is a 12-beat cycle divided as **2 + 2 + 2 + 2 + 2 + 2** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **O**, **2**, **O**, **3**, **4**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the twelve columns correspond to beats 1–12, with sam **X** at beat 1, **O** (khālī) at beat 3, **2** at beat 5, **O** (khālī) at beat 7, **3** at beat 9, and **4** at beat 11. 

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered .cautal}

::: {.notation-table}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{D}}$ | D | P | - | P | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{D}}\mathrm{M}}$ | - | G | $\lb{\mathrm{GR}}$ | G | G |
| **sa** | **-** | **pta** | **su** | **-** | **ra** | **ti** | **-** | **na** | **grā** | **-** | **ma** |
| G | G | R | G | D | P | M | G | $\lb{\mathrm{GR}}$ | G | R | S |
| **e** | **ka** | **-** | **i** | **-** | **śa** | **-** | **mū** | **ra** | **cha** | **-** | **na** |
| S | S | $\lb{\mathrm{S}\mn{\mathrm{D}}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{S}\mn{\mathrm{N}}}$ | R | $\lb{\mathrm{GM}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{MP}}$ | M | $\lb{\mathrm{GR}}$ | G | R | S |
| **bā** | **-** | **-** | **i** | **-** | **śa** | **-** | **śu** | **ra** | **ti** | **-** | **me** |
| $\lb{\mathrm{PP}}$ | - | - | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{N}}\mathrm{D}}$ | $\lb{-\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{\mathrm{R}}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **u** | **na** | **-** | **ñcā** | **-** | **śa** | **ko** | **-** | **ṭa** | **tā** | **-** | **na** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | D | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{D}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{ND}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{ND}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{MD}}$ | P |
| **sā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **dha** | **nā** | **-** | **da** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered .cautal}

::: {.notation-table}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{D}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **ā** | **-** | **-** | **ro** | **-** | **hī** | **a** | **ba** | **-** | **ro** | **-** | **hī** |
| $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{N}\tr{\mathrm{R}}}$ | N | D | N | D | P |
| **ā** | **-** | **-** | **sthā** | **-** | **yī** | **sa** | **-** | **-** | **ñcā** | **-** | **ri** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{D}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{N}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ |
| **ā** | **-** | **-** | **ro** | **-** | **hī** | **a** | **ba** | **-** | **ro** | **-** | **hī** |
| $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{N}\tr{\mathrm{R}}}$ | N | D | N | D | P |
| **ā** | **-** | **-** | **sthā** | **-** | **yī** | **sa** | **-** | **-** | **ñcā** | **-** | **ri** |
| P | M | G | P | M | G | G | G | R | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{S}}\mn{\mathrm{N}}}$ | R | S |
| **dhū** | **ra** | **ṇa** | **mū** | **ra** | **ṇa** | **u** | **gha** | **ṭa** | **pra** | **ga** | **ṭa** |
| $\lb{\mathrm{SS}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | - | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\tr{\mathrm{S}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\tr{\mathrm{S}}\mathrm{D}}$ | R | $\lb{--\mathrm{ND}}$ | N | $\lb{\mathrm{DM}}$ | D | P |
| **ti** | **-** | **-** | **vara** | **bā** | **-** | **-** | **ni** | **khā** | **-** | **-** | **da** |

:::

## Sanchārī {.unnumbered .cautal}

::: {.notation-table}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| G | - | - | G | - | $\lb{\mathrm{GG}}$ | G | - | - | $\lb{\mathrm{GG}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{RG}}$ | G |
| **ka** | **-** | **-** | **ṇṭhā** | **-** | **bhara** | **ṇa** | **-** | **-** | **banā** | **-** | **ve** |
| $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{G}}\mathrm{P}}$ | M | R | $\lb{\mathrm{GM}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{GP}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{PP}}$ | P | M | G | $\lb{\mathrm{GG}}$ | R | S |
| **sā** | **-** | **-** | **co** | **-** | **paṭa** | **rī** | **-** | **-** | **paṭhā** | **-** | **ve** |
| - | $\lb{\sps{\mathrm{S}}\mn{\mathrm{N}}}$ | R | G | G | - | P | P | M | G | R | S |
| **-** | **su** | **ra** | **sa** | **mvā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **da** |

:::

## Ābhog {.unnumbered .cautal}

::: {.notation-table}

| **X** |   | **O** |   | **2** |   | **O** |   | **3** |   | **4** |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| S | R | S | R | G | G | R | G | G | R | S | - |
| **sā** | **re** | **sā** | **re** | **gā** | **gā** | **re** | **gā** | **gā** | **re** | **sā** | **-** |
| P | M | G | G | R | G | G | R | S | R | G | M |
| **pā** | **mā** | **gā** | **gā** | **re** | **gā** | **gā** | **re** | **sā** | **re** | **gā** | **mā** |
| P | D | N | D | P | N | D | P | N | N | D | D |
| **pā** | **dhā** | **ni** | **dhā** | **pā** | **ni** | **dhā** | **pā** | **ni** | **ni** | **dhā** | **dhā** |
| P | P | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{G}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{R}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | S | R | G | M | P | D |
| **pā** | **pā** | **gā** | **gā** | **re** | **sā** | **sā** | **re** | **gā** | **mā** | **pā** | **dhā** |
| $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\sps{\tr{\mathrm{S}}}\tr{\mathrm{R}}}$ | $\tr{\mathrm{S}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{ND}}$ | N | $\lb{\mathrm{DM}}$ | $\lb{\mathrm{DP}}$ |
| **pu** | **ra** | **ta** | **su** | **ra** | **ta** | **mi** | **ṭa** | **ta** | **vā** | **-** | **da** |

:::
